items.claim: Fatima Klein has a massive size advantage over Tabitha Ricci.
items.quote: Fatima Klein is going to have a massive size advantage over Richi in this matchup.

items.claim: Tabitha Ricci's striking is poor and has not shown improvement.
items.quote: I always get surprised by how bad her striking is... And it's not getting better either.

items.claim: Fatima Klein is a wrestler who prioritizes top control and ground and pound.
items.quote: Klein is a wrestler. She wants to get on top. She wants to ground on pounds.

items.claim: Chase Hooper's striking defense and overall striking ability are poor.
items.quote: I just think that Chase Hooper's striking defense and the striking in general looks so bad

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has a history of giving up significant control time in his UFC career.
items.quote: Ramirez has given up so much control time in his UFC career so far.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan has poor fight IQ.
items.quote: I think that his fight IQ is some of the worst in the middleweight division.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan has a high finishing rate with 10 knockouts and 1 submission.
items.quote: This is someone with 10 wins by knockout, one win by submission.
